Headline: Howard-bound Red Line Delays
ShortDescription: Howard-bound Red Line trains are running with residual delays following an earlier door problem on the train near Grand. Service is resuming, allow extra time.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Howard-bound Red Line trains are running with residual delays following an earlier door problem on the train near Grand.

Shuttles buses have been requested from Clark/Lake to Fullerton to provide connecting service through the affected area.

Consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes or using buses to other rail lines.

These may include:

#22 Clark

#29 State

#36 Broadway

#62 Archer

Bus Shuttles will conclude at 9:00 a.m

Personnel are working to restore service. Allow extra travel time.
